name: Is attorney AI visibility even legal in California like LA or San Diego?

mainEntity.name: Is attorney AI visibility even legal in California like LA or San Diego?

acceptedAnswer.description: Yes, AI marketing tools like Smithy AI are legal for enhancing search visibility, not practicing law.[4] Regulated as advertising.[4] Key factors: no legal advice given; credibility-focused content; ethical ad rules apply.[2] Use for profiles/experience narratives; avoid guarantees; comply with state bar ads.[4] Boosts findability ethically.
